data.title: LuxUrban Hotels Reshuffles Leadership and Shifts Strategy
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

LuxUrban Hotels ( (LUXH) ) has issued an announcement.

LuxUrban Hotels Inc. has announced significant changes in its board of directors, with the appointment of Brian Ferdinand as the interim Chief Executive Officer and the addition of four new directors: Brandon Elster, Alex Moinian, Daniel Shapiro, and Bradley Theodore. These appointments come after the resignations of several directors and are aimed at reinforcing the company’s leadership and governance. The new directors bring diverse expertise from fields such as real estate development and digital media marketing, which may enhance LuxUrban’s strategic positioning in the hospitality industry. Furthermore, the company has decided not to proceed with a potential joint venture with Lockwood Development Partners LLC, indicating a shift in its strategic priorities.

More about LuxUrban Hotels

data.description:

New Horizon Aircraft ( (HOVR) ) has shared an announcement.

New Horizon Aircraft Ltd. has secured a strategic investment of $8.4 million, which will bolster its financial stability and support the continued development and testing of its hybrid eVTOL, the Cavorite X7. This funding, facilitated through a subscription agreement with multiple investors, reflects a deepening commitment to the company’s goals, including market entry and addressing governance and regulatory priorities.

More about New Horizon Aircraft

Horizon Aircraft (NASDAQ: HOVR) is an advanced aerospace engineering company focused on developing hybrid electric Vertical TakeOff and Landing (eVTOL) aircraft. The company is known for its innovative designs that prioritize safety, performance, and operational utility, aiming to enter the market with its Cavorite X7 eVTOL, which combines traditional aircraft capabilities with hybrid electric technology.

data.title: Source Energy Refinances to Boost Liquidity and Growth
data.description:
Source Energy Services Ltd (TSE:SHLE) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Source Energy Services Ltd. has refinanced its credit facilities with a $135 million term loan and a $40 million revolving loan, improving its financial flexibility and liquidity. The new arrangements will help the company to redeem its senior secured notes and extend debt maturities to 2029. This strategic move supports Source Energy’s long-term growth objectives while reducing borrowing costs.

data.title: AGM Group Forms Strategic Partnership with Nowlit to Boost Computing Power
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

AGM Group Holdings ( (AGMH) ) just unveiled an update.

AGM Group Holdings Inc. has entered into a strategic partnership with Canada’s Nowlit Solutions Corp. to enhance its high-performance computing capabilities, focusing on green energy data centers and cryptocurrency computing power. This agreement marks a major step in AGM’s expansion strategy in the North American data center sector, with plans to incrementally develop additional data centers in Canada over the next two years, ultimately aiming for a total computing power capacity of 18,427 petahashes. This initiative strengthens AGM’s market position in the burgeoning data center industry and aligns with the growing demand for digital assets and the latest advancements in artificial intelligence technology.

More about AGM Group Holdings

AGM Group Holdings Inc. is an integrated technology company that specializes in the assembly and sales of high-performance hardware and computing equipment. The company is focused on blockchain-oriented Application-Specific Integrated Circuit (ASIC) chips and high-end crypto miners for Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies, aiming to be a significant contributor to the global blockchain ecosystem.

data.title: Hyperscale Data Announces Dividend Strategy Adjustments
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Hyperscale Data ( (GPUS) ) just unveiled an update.

Hyperscale Data announced a cash dividend of $0.2708333 per share for its Series D Preferred Stock, while deferring the dividend for its Series E Preferred Stock due to the allowance of permitted deferrals. This strategic move reflects the company’s commitment to consistent dividends and indicates an anticipated dividend payout for Series E in 2025, highlighting Hyperscale’s ongoing financial management strategies.

More about Hyperscale Data

Hyperscale Data, Inc. is a diversified holding company transitioning to solely owning and operating data centers to support high performance computing services. It operates through subsidiaries and strategic investments, offering digital asset mining, colocation, hosting services, and mission-critical products across various industries including artificial intelligence, social gaming, defense/aerospace, and more. The company is also involved in private credit and structured finance.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Announces Board Changes Amid Leadership Shifts
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Morgan Stanley ( (MS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Stephen Luczo has resigned from Morgan Stanley’s Board of Directors for personal reasons, effective December 31, 2024, with no disagreements cited with the company. Following his resignation and James Gorman’s previously announced retirement, the Board will reduce its size from 15 to 13 members starting January 1, 2025.

More about Morgan Stanley

Morgan Stanley is a leading global financial services firm providing investment banking, securities, wealth management, and investment management services. The company serves a diverse group of clients and is committed to maintaining its position as a prominent player in the financial sector.

An update from E2open Parent Holdings ( (ETWO) ) is now available.

E2open has announced significant leadership changes with the promotion of Pawan Joshi to Chief Strategy Officer and the appointment of Rachit Lohani as Chief Product and Technology Officer. These strategic roles aim to drive corporate growth, enhance client engagement, and foster innovation in E2open’s supply chain solutions. Joshi’s vast experience and leadership will help deepen the market understanding of E2open’s capabilities, while Lohani’s technical expertise will guide the evolution of the company’s SaaS platform to support client-centric growth and innovation.

More about E2open Parent Holdings

E2open Parent Holdings, Inc. is a leading connected supply chain software platform that facilitates the transformation of how the world’s largest companies make, move, and sell goods and services. Their cloud-native global platform connects over 480,000 partners across manufacturing, logistics, channel, and distribution networks, processing over 16 billion transactions annually.
